## How To Test

- [ ] `meson setup builddir`
- [ ] `meson compile -C builddir`
- [ ] `meson test -C builddir`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation when needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests when needed

- [ ] This change is backward compatible or documented as breaking
